_comment: STAGING DATA — Lesson citations only, sourced from Michael Wayne Arnold's Date::Lectionary::Daily (acna-sec_lect_daily.xml, BSD 2-Clause, see THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md). Produced for issue #20; NOT yet consumed by the calendar engine (that is issue #9). Keyed by MM-DD (calendar date, per BCP 2019's continuous-reading structure — see the Design note in issue #7 for how the two-year Year I/II cycle selects between the Morning and Evening pairs at runtime). Psalms are not included — DOCX extraction tracked in a follow-up issue. The "†" character appearing inline within some citations marks an Easter-dependent substitution per the BCP's own legend; preserved verbatim here, not yet parsed into a separate flag — semantic handling is part of the same follow-up issue. Type labels (MorningFirstLesson etc.) are provisional staging labels, not the final ReadingType enum — #9 decides the real data model shape.
